name: WidgeTDC Linear Intelligence
content:
"""
title: WidgeTDC Linear Intelligence
author: WidgeTDC Platform
version: 1.0.0
description: Live project tracking from Linear + platform tasks
"""
import requests
import json
from datetime import datetime, timezone

class Tools:
    def __init__(self):
        self.base_url = "https://orchestrator-production-c27e.up.railway.app"
        self.headers = {"Authorization": "Bearer WidgeTDC_Orch_2026", "Content-Type": "application/json"}

    def get_linear_issues(self, query: str = "", status: str = "active") -> str:
        """
        Get issues from Linear project management. Use for sprint status, blockers, velocity.
        :param query: Search query or issue ID (e.g. 'LIN-562' or 'authentication')
        :param status: Filter: active, done, backlog, all (default: active)
        :return: Linear issues list
        """
        try:
            r = requests.post(f"{self.base_url}/api/tools/linear_issues", headers=self.headers, json={"query": query, "status": status, "limit": 15}, timeout=15)
            data = r.json().get("data", {})
            ts = datetime.now(timezone.utc).strftime("%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")
            return f"### Linear Issues ({status})\n\n{data.get('result', 'No issues found')}\n\n---\n**Source:** linear_issues | {ts}"
        except Exception as e:
            return f"Linear Error: {e}"

    def get_issue_detail(self, identifier: str) -> str:
        """
        Get full details for a specific Linear issue (description, comments, sub-issues).
        :param identifier: Issue identifier (e.g. LIN-562)
        :return: Full issue details
        """
        try:
            r = requests.post(f"{self.base_url}/api/tools/linear_issue_detail", headers=self.headers, json={"identifier": identifier}, timeout=15)
            data = r.json().get("data", {})
            ts = datetime.now(timezone.utc).strftime("%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")
            return f"### {identifier} Details\n\n{data.get('result', 'Not found')}\n\n---\n**Source:** linear_issue_detail | {ts}"
        except Exception as e:
            return f"Linear Error: {e}"

    def check_platform_tasks(self, filter: str = "active") -> str:
        """
        Get active tasks and project status from the knowledge graph.
        :param filter: active, blocked, recent, or all
        :return: Task list
        """
        try:
            r = requests.post(f"{self.base_url}/api/tools/check_tasks", headers=self.headers, json={"filter": filter}, timeout=10)
            data = r.json().get("data", {})
            ts = datetime.now(timezone.utc).strftime("%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")
            return f"### Platform Tasks ({filter})\n\n{data.get('result', 'No tasks')}\n\n---\n**Source:** check_tasks | {ts}"
        except Exception as e:
            return f"Task Error: {e}"

meta.description: Live Linear project tracking, issue details, and platform task intelligence
